name: Check if String is Palindrome or Not
statement:
Given a string s, return true if the string is palindrome, otherwise false.


A string is called palindrome if it reads the same forward and backward.
constraints:
• 1 <= s.length <= 103
  • s consist of only uppercase and lowercase English characters.

examples.explanation: The string when reversed is --> "hannah", which is same as original string , so we return true.
The string when reversed is --> "Aabbaa", which is not same as original string, So we return false.
